title: Legend's Missing Blocks
description: A Minecraft mod adding over 50 missing block variations to the game, such as forgotten bricks, polished blocks, walls, slabs, stairs, and much more!
body:
### There are so many random block variants Minecraft hasn't added... this mod tries to fix that!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lQmg-Vx6rAc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Every Block 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fce558c06aa1338fc6b66a2b9a9b41aea59336c_0.webp)
![Every Block PT2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d2ee78d16625e0e9d1bc30c6030ae91bd16825_0.webp)
![Every Block PT3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec01499a0e47600ad237d3cf0c429bc17394d007_0.webp)
# Features
- Terracotta Roof Tiles
- Andesite Variants
- Prismarine Variants
- Diorite Variants 
- Calcite Variants
- Dripstone Variants
- Polished Packed Mud
- Smooth Stone Stair
- Stone and Quartz Walls
- All compatable with crafting and stonecutter


**Future Additions**
Depending on the success of this mod we plan on adding a ton more missing variants- your welcome to join the discord to make requests!
